zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily de Valoignes於1281年出生在英國素福爾可瑟斯頓時，她的父親Robert Valoignes56歲，母親Eve Criketot22歲。她於大約1297年與Robert de Ufford II在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1325年6月16日在她的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布特利。

meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily de Valoignes was born in 1281, in Thurston, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert Valoignes, was 56 and her mother, Eve Criketot, was 22. She married Robert de Ufford II about 1297, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 16 June 1325, in her hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Butley, Suffolk, England.

fr.Parham, Plomesgate, Suffolk, England: Parham with Hacheston, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily de Valoignes est née en 1281, à Thurston, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Valoignes, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Eve Criketot, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Ufford II environ 1297, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 juin 1325, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Butley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily de Valoignes 1281 in Thurston, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Valoignes 56 und ihre Mutter Eve Criketot 22. Sie hat um 1297 in Suffolk, England Robert de Ufford II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Juni 1325 im Alter von 44 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Butley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Valoignes è nata il nel 1281 nel Thurston, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Robert Valoignes, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Eve Criketot, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Ufford II circa 1297, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 giugno 1325, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Butley, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily de Valoignesが1281年にイギリススフォルクスウルストンで生まれた時，父Robert Valoignesは56歳，母Eve Criketotは22歳であった。約1297年にイギリススフォルクでRobert de Ufford IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1325年6月16日に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブトリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Parham, Plomesgate, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 파람 위스 하체스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Cecily de Valoignes(이)가 1281년 영국 수폴크 스르스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Valoignes(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve Criketot(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1297년 영국 수폴크에서 Robert de Ufford II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1325년 6월 16일 그녀의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.Offord D'Arcy, Huntingdonshire, England,: Offord D'Arcy, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Valoignes nasceu em 1281, em Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Valoignes, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Eve Criketot, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Ufford II aproximadamente 1297, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de junho de 1325, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Butley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Parham, Plomesgate, Suffolk, England: парам вит хачестон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily de Valoignes родилась в 1281 г. в местности турстон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Valoignes было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve Criketot, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Ufford II около 1297 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 16 июня 1325 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности батли, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily de Valoignes nació en 1281, en Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Valoignes, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Eve Criketot, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Robert de Ufford II aproximadamente 1297, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de junio de 1325, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Butley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
